name: Feature Request

---

## Problem / Motivation

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature solves or what value it adds.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like it to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or links to similar implementations.
